TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_olit, title = olit, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/olit} }

S.FORM: == olit == kwohe ga sinu ana nni'un na cyolu uy. olit ga, mita' ngyaw lga, mutu kinsuruw mgyay la. olit na ksumuk hiya' ga, blaq nya' maki' talap ngasal. cipuq cikay hi' nya' ru blaq nya' balay qmihuy slaq ru hriqun nya' kwara' pinuya'.

== olit == kwohe ga sinu ana nni'un na cyolu uy. olit ga, mita' ngyaw lga, mutu kinsuruw mgyay la. olit na ksumuk hiya' ga, blaq nya' maki' talap ngasal. cipuq cikay hi' nya' ru blaq nya' balay qmihuy slaq ru hriqun nya' kwara' pinuya'.
S.PHON: == olit == kwoħe ɣa s~ɕinu ana nniʔun na ʦ~ʨjolu uj. olit ɣa, mitaʔ ŋjaw lɣa, mutu kins~ɕuruw mɣjaj la. olit na ks~ɕumuk ħijaʔ ɣa, βlaq njaʔ makiʔ talap ŋas~ɕal. ʦ~ʨipuq ʦ~ʨikaj ħiʔ njaʔ ru βlaq njaʔ βalaj qmiħuj s~ɕlaq ru ħriqun njaʔ kwaraʔ pinujaʔ.
